# Congxing Cai

Congxing Cai is an AI founder-operator, Partner and CTO at Embedding VC, and former engineering leader at Snap and Google.

Core areas:
- AI-native products
- ML systems and recommendation platforms
- large-scale consumer platforms (200M+ users)
- founder support and venture studio building
- technical recruiting and talent intelligence
- NLP and information retrieval

Notable experience:
- Led Snap Discover & Stories engineering (80+ person org, 200M+ daily viewers, built personalization platform from ground up)
- Technical Lead at Google (Ads Reach solutions, sub-10ms latency, revenue-critical systems)
- Principal Software Engineer at Houzz (ads infrastructure, Redis Cluster migration)
- Founded Youpi Inc. (raised from top investors, 12-person team, 10+ AI consumer products including Realm AI and Synco AI)
- Research at USC/ISI (TREC 2011 Best System award, GeoXray acquired by TerraGo, 10+ papers)
- Research at Penn State and Microsoft Research Asia (NLP, document retrieval, learning to rank)

Education:
- Penn State University (Ph.D Candidate and Master of Engineering, Computer Science)
- University of Science and Technology of China (BS, Computer Science)
- University of Southern California (Research Staff, Natural Language Processing)

Current interests:
- GenAI creative tools and AI film workflows
- Physical AI and robotics
- LLM foundations, evals, and data quality
- AI recruiting and talent intelligence
- data and evaluation workflows
- agentic systems and workflow automation
